summary: Tested TTS voice change to Elise and mobile paw-print sidebar for member pages. All features verified working. Fixed bug where sidebar was appearing on admin/login pages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: TTS voice is Elise (EST9Ui6982FZPSi7gCHi). Mobile sidebar works on member pages, hidden on admin/login/register pages. All pillar navigation items present: Dine, Care, Stay, Travel, Celebrate, Fit, Learn.

paw_print_toggle_visible_mobile.details: data-testid='member-nav-toggle' visible on mobile viewport (<768px), positioned at left=0, top=378

paw_print_hidden_desktop.details: Toggle hidden on desktop (>=768px) via md:hidden CSS class

sidebar_opens_on_click.details: Clicking toggle opens drawer with Quick Nav header

all_pillars_present.details: Dine, Care, Stay, Travel, Celebrate, Fit, Learn all present with data-testid attributes

current_page_highlighted.details: Active page shows bg-teal-600 text-white styling

navigation_works.details: Clicking pillar navigates to page and closes sidebar

bug_fixed.issue: MemberMobileNav was appearing on admin/login pages
bug_fixed.fix: Added shouldHide logic with hiddenPaths array, moved early return after all hooks to comply with React rules
